title: TrackAbex Helper
description: TrackAbex helper mod to collect Stoneworks shop data.
body:
TrackAbex Helper is a Stoneworks mod to automatically upload shop data to the [TrackAbex Website](https://track.crimsonbank.xyz/), hosted at https://track.crimsonbank.xyz

The mod automatically tracks shop data whenever right/left clicking a chestshop. A notification appears in chat when a shop has been detected and tracked. 

Additionally, press F6 for an automatic profit/loss tracker GUI to track your profit/loss for flips in each session.
